location.addressLine: 35 Washington St, Centre, Cork, T12 DHX2

featuredItems.title: Paneer Potato Masala Dosa
featuredItems.summary: The clearest first order: a crisp dosa wrapped around paneer and potato masala.

featuredItems.title: Batura Chole Bhature
featuredItems.summary: Puffy bhature and chickpea curry when you want the richer, heavier plate.

featuredItems.title: Gulab Jamun
featuredItems.summary: Warm gulab jamun for a short sweet finish after the savoury plates.

services.title: Signature dosas
services.summary: Go here first if you want the plate that makes the menu easiest to understand.

services.title: Street Plates
services.summary: Choose this lane when you want something richer and more filling than a dosa stop.

services.title: Sweet finish
services.summary: Finish with gulab jamun if you want dessert without turning the meal into a long close.

faqItems.question: What should I try first?
faqItems.answer: Start with the Paneer Potato Masala Dosa. Go for Batura Chole Bhature if you want something heavier.

faqItems.question: Can I call before pickup or delivery?
faqItems.answer: Yes. Use the phone number on the page if you want to confirm pickup or delivery details before you go.

proofPoints: People repeatedly mention tasty food, friendly staff, and quick service.
Dine-in, delivery, and pickup are confirmed.
credibilityRisks: No verified website or order flow yet.
No verified first-party email in the current source set.

brand.tagline: Crisp dosa and curry plates on Washington Street.
brand.shortDescription: A Cork city stop for South Indian dosa, curry plates, dine-in, pickup, or delivery.
brand.heroSignature: Start with the Paneer Potato Masala Dosa, then move to bhature when you want something heavier.
brand.visualMood: Warm South Indian kitchen with bright plates and quick local energy
brand.photographyStyle: Real food photography with warm tabletop light and an honest local feel.
brand.materialFinish: Warm cream, saffron, tamarind red, and leaf green accents.
brand.imageTreatment: Warm tabletop photography with clean, food-first framing.

seo.title: The Dosa Spot | South Indian Restaurant in Cork
seo.description: The Dosa Spot is a South Indian restaurant on Washington Street in Cork known for dosa, quick service, dine-in, pickup, and delivery.
